steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The second sentence states the sloth's disappearance “likely affected several other species.” The word “affected” reveals the passage is discussing the impact or effects of the extinction.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean effects or impacts on the ecosystem — the sloth's extinction affected other species. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — sources in: "had a number of sources in the larger ecosystem" — sources means origins or causes; the sentence is about what the extinction caused, not where it came from. ✗
  • Choice B — consequences for: "had a number of consequences for the larger ecosystem" — consequences means effects or outcomes, directly matching "likely affected several other species." ✓
  • Choice C — similarities to: "had a number of similarities to the larger ecosystem" — similarities means likenesses; the passage discusses impact, not resemblance. ✗
  • Choice D — precedents in: "had a number of precedents in the larger ecosystem" — precedents means earlier examples; the passage looks forward to effects, not back to prior cases. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
